title: Linux Network Service Scanning
description: Detects network scanning tools (nmap, masscan, zmap) used for host and service discovery. Attackers use these tools during the discovery phase to map network topology and identify vulnerable services.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*nmap') or ('Process Name' like '*masscan') or ('Process Name' like '*zmap') or ((msg like '*nmap -s*' or msg like '*nmap -p*' or msg like '*masscan -p*' or msg like '*zmap -p*')))
